artPrompt: A dramatic moment as a wall of toxic green sludge breaches a crumbling spillway and floods outward in every direction, sickly bioluminescent froth surging across drowned lawns and rusted pipes under a bruised stormy sky. Drifting litter rides the indiscriminate wave. Wide, kinetic film-still framing of an unaimable flood at epic scale, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Sludge Surge
text: Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control with a sludge counter on it deals combat damage to a player, it deals that much damage to each other opponent too. The flood does not pick favorites. (It picks you. You're fine.)
flavorText: Once it tops the spillway, there is no aiming it. There is only the after.
